title: A Frozen Rooster
plot: The movie centers on Toto's family journeying to the South Pole to return a polar bear and Spanish penguins home, facing obstacles that highlight the value of teamwork along the way.
director: Gabriel Riva Palacio Alatriste, Rodolfo Riva Palacio Alatriste
actors: Bruno Bichir, Maite Perroni, Carlos Espejel

categories.label: multinational visitors moving through a thin human footprint
categories.description: Human presence on the continent is sparse and temporary, with crews, researchers, and occasional visitors passing through small enclaves in a vast unpeopled setting. What you'll see: compact stations in huge emptiness, mixed accents and uniforms, shared equipment, and tiny clusters of human activity against ice and sea.
